cases.input: We have an Azure subscription with VMs, AKS clusters, Azure SQL databases, and App Services. Which Defender for Cloud plans should we enable and at what tier?
cases.context: Production environment, financial services, 50 VMs, 3 AKS clusters, 10 SQL databases, 5 App Service apps, compliance with PCI-DSS required

cases.input: Set up Azure Key Vault for our application. The app needs to read secrets, the CI/CD pipeline needs to write secrets, and only break-glass accounts should have full admin access. Currently we have inline secrets in app settings.
cases.context: Azure App Service, system-assigned Managed Identity, Azure DevOps for CI/CD, no existing Key Vault

cases.input: Our Azure SQL database, Storage account, and Key Vault are all accessible over the public internet. We need to restrict access to our production environment.
cases.context: Hub-spoke VNet topology, App Service in spoke VNet, all data services currently public, production workload

cases.input: Our DevOps team asks: what security controls should we add to our CI/CD pipeline for our containerized .NET application? We currently have no secret scanning or supply chain security.
cases.context: GitHub Actions, Docker containers, Trivy not configured, no SBOM generation, no branch protection enabled

cases.input: We're designing a new customer-facing web API. Walk us through applying OWASP Top 10 at design time.
cases.context: Azure App Service, .NET 9 API, Azure AD authentication, Cosmos DB backend, WAF not yet configured
